persona.name: Raj Sharma
persona.lifestyle: Family-oriented, luxury traveler, high-income software engineer
persona.family: Wife Anita, Son Aryan (12, mild asthma), Daughter Priya (9)
health_concerns: Family cardiac history requiring stress testing (€800-1200/year)

persona.travel_frequency: Very frequent business travel (87 days/year) + luxury family vacations
